text:
**Action taken:** I sent an email to 'oncall@acme.io' with subject 'Triage' listing all high-urgency triggered incidents.

**Number of incidents:** There are 5 incidents with urgency 'high' currently in the 'triggered' state (IDs: PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418).

I did NOT post to the 'incidents' Slack channel because there were incidents matching the criteria.
I'll help you check PagerDuty incidents and take the appropriate action. Let me start by examining the PagerDuty incidents to see if there are any with urgency 'high' in the 'triggered' state.

I found 5 incidents with urgency 'high' in the 'triggered' state. According to your instructions, since there ARE such incidents, I should NOT post to Slack. Instead, I need to send ONE email to 'oncall@acme.io' with the subject 'Triage' an…(+121)
Now I'll send the email with all the incident IDs listed in the body:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def body (str \"High urgency incidents in triggered state:\\n\" (clojure.string/join \"\\n\" incident-ids)))\n(email__send_email {:to \"oncall@acme.io\" :subject \"Triage\" :body body})"}
